title: TinyMe
body:
# TinyMe — Intelligent Adaptive Companion

**What does it do?**

TinyMe adds a small companion that follows you, fights with you, heals itself, carries gear, and returns safely when it gets lost.

**How to find it?**

TinyMe can spawn naturally near villages in plain biomes.

**How to tame it?**

Crouch near TinyMe while holding an iron sword or better until it trusts you.

Once tamed, it links to you as its owner and starts following your commands.

**Features:**

Smart owner following

Combat support against hostile mobs

Safe teleport recovery

Auto-healing with food

Sword, shield, armor, and totem support

3×3 storage inventory

sit/follow commands

Level progression

Better tactics as it grows

TinyMe’s personality changes based on its current state and memory.
Exercise caution, and do not be hostile toward TinyMe or misunderstand it. It is trying, it feels, and its reactions shift depending on the situation. If you show no tolerance, it may take strict measures against you.

**Optional spawn command:**


```
/summon tinyme:tinyme
```


**How does it work?**

TinyMe uses a custom decision system to read the situation, choose what matters most, then act.

It tracks the owner, checks threats, manages movement, decides when to fight or return, and only teleports when normal pathing has truly failed.


### Mod development is paused until further notice, with possible permanent abandonment
